features: 3 PACK OF BATH SPONGES - These luxuriously soft yet sturdy bath sponges are great for gentle scrubbing. They are colour coordinated and perfect for home and holiday use
BATH TIME, FUN TIME - Make bath time more exciting with these adorable animal-shaped exfoliating sponges. Designed to be luxuriously soft on skin to provide a gentle scrub.
ADORABLE ANIMAL SHAPES - These colourful foam sponges are designed in the shape of a fish, bear and duck to make for some fun educational play during bath time.

CLEANER FOR LONGER - Use only a little soap and enjoy a handful of foamy bubbles, ideal for the shower or bubble baths. These bath sponges dry quickly and keep fresher for longer - simply squeeze to get rid of excess liquid. They are reusable and can be used for extended lifetimes
description: Product Description HOMESmith - Animal Shape Bath Shower Sponge - 3 Pack of Gentle Exfoliating Sponges For Bath & Shower. HOMESmith only offers the best quality products to make your life easier and simpler. The colourful animal-shaped luxurious sponge set provides gentle exfoliation and fun during bath time. Tastefully designed with high-quality material, these foam sponges are durable and dependable. They dry quickly and keep fresher for longer - simply squeeze to get rid of excess liquid. They are reusable and can be used for extended lifetimes. Directions To use, wet the sponge and apply a small amount of soap. Gently scrub skin to exfoliate. After use, squeeze out excess water and allow to dry thoroughly to prevent bacterial growth. Do not share the sponge with others. Safety Warning Always dry the sponge thoroughly after use to prevent bacterial growth and maintain hygiene. Do not share the sponge with others to avoid cross-contamination. See more
